feedback.text: Ladies and Gentlemen, I fully agree with the above-mentioned objectives of the Digital fairness act. Ladies and Gentlemen, I fully agree with the above-mentioned objectives of the Digital fairness act. However, in addition to the above-mentioned content, I would like to suggest that the protection and continued existence of digitally acquired goods, namely video games, should also be attached to the proposal. The aim is to counter the simple shutdown of video games already sold with an appropriate end of life plan pages of operators. This does not mean the receipt of the connected servers, but a transfer to the community or a disconnection of the game clerk from the server. I hope this action will not only preserve the purchases made by EU citizens, but also contribute to the general preservation of cultural goods.
